---
title: "ConsultingModell"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  error = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(ggplot2)
library(lme4)
library(mgcv)
options(scipen = 999)
```

```{r}
c_bed <- readRDS(here("prepped Data", "C_bed.rds"))
c_ein <- readRDS(here("prepped Data", "C_ein.rds"))
n_bed <- readRDS(here("prepped Data", "N_bed.rds"))
n_ein <- readRDS(here("prepped Data", "N_ein.rds"))
CS    <- readRDS(here("prepped Data", "CS.rds"))
INC   <- readRDS(here("prepped Data", "INC.rds"))
```

FRT.WD Residuals vs Fitted
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(mgcv)
library(glmmTMB)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

# =========================================================
# INPUT
# Erwartet vorhandene Datensätze:
# c_bed, c_ein, n_bed, n_ein, CS
# =========================================================

dfs <- list(
  c_bed = c_bed,
  c_ein = c_ein,
  n_bed = n_bed,
  n_ein = n_ein,
  CS    = CS
)

experiments_with_speaker <- c("n_bed", "n_ein", "CS")

# =========================================================
# HELFER
# =========================================================

safe_plain_df <- function(df) {
  out <- as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN AOI-WEISE VORBEREITEN
# =========================================================

prep_aoi_data <- function(df,
                          response = "FRT.WD",
                          use_speaker = FALSE) {
  needed <- c(response, "condition", "AOI", "Participant", "Topic")
  if (use_speaker) needed <- c(needed, "speaker")

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[response]])) %>%
    filter(.data[[response]] > 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(condition), !is.na(AOI), !is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic)) %>%
    mutate(
      condition = factor(condition),
      AOI = factor(AOI),
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic)
    )

  if (use_speaker) {
    out <- out %>%
      filter(!is.na(speaker)) %>%
      mutate(speaker = factor(speaker))
  }

  safe_plain_df(out)
}

# =========================================================
# FORMELN
# =========================================================

make_gam_normal_formula <- function(response = "FRT.WD",
                                    use_speaker = FALSE) {
  rhs <- if (use_speaker) {
    "condition * speaker + s(Topic, bs = 're') + s(Participant, bs = 're')"
  } else {
    "condition + s(Topic, bs = 're') + s(Participant, bs = 're')"
  }

  as.formula(paste(response, "~", rhs))
}

make_gamma_glmmtmb_formula <- function(response = "FRT.WD",
                                       use_speaker = FALSE) {
  rhs <- if (use_speaker) {
    "condition * speaker + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
  } else {
    "condition + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
  }

  as.formula(paste(response, "~", rhs))
}

# =========================================================
# FITS
# =========================================================

fit_gam_normal <- function(data, formula) {
  tryCatch(
    mgcv::gam(
      formula = formula,
      data = data,
      family = gaussian(),
      method = "REML",
      select = TRUE
    ),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
}

fit_gamma_glmmtmb <- function(data, formula) {
  tryCatch(
    glmmTMB::glmmTMB(
      formula = formula,
      data = data,
      family = Gamma(link = "log")
    ),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
}

# =========================================================
# RESPONSE-RESIDUEN SELBST BERECHNEN
# residual = observed - fitted
# =========================================================

extract_gam_normal_resid_fitted <- function(fit, data, response = "FRT.WD") {
  observed <- data[[response]]

  if (is.null(fit)) {
    return(tibble(
      fitted = NA_real_,
      residual = NA_real_,
      observed = observed
    ))
  }

  fitted_vals <- tryCatch(
    as.numeric(predict(fit, type = "response")),
    error = function(e) rep(NA_real_, nrow(data))
  )

  tibble(
    fitted = fitted_vals,
    residual = observed - fitted_vals,
    observed = observed
  )
}

extract_gamma_glmmtmb_resid_fitted <- function(fit, data, response = "FRT.WD") {
  observed <- data[[response]]

  if (is.null(fit)) {
    return(tibble(
      fitted = NA_real_,
      residual = NA_real_,
      observed = observed
    ))
  }

  fitted_vals <- tryCatch(
    as.numeric(predict(fit, type = "response")),
    error = function(e) rep(NA_real_, nrow(data))
  )

  tibble(
    fitted = fitted_vals,
    residual = observed - fitted_vals,
    observed = observed
  )
}

# =========================================================
# EINZELPLOTS
# =========================================================

plot_resid_vs_fitted_single <- function(plot_df,
                                        experiment,
                                        aoi,
                                        model_label) {
  ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = fitted, y = residual)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.55) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = 2) +
    labs(
      title = model_label,
      subtitle = paste0("Experiment: ", experiment, " | AOI: ", aoi),
      x = "Fitted values",
      y = "Response residuals"
    ) +
    theme_bw()
}

# =========================================================
# EIN FALL: EXPERIMENT x AOI
# =========================================================

fit_and_plot_one_aoi <- function(df,
                                 experiment_name,
                                 aoi_value,
                                 response = "FRT.WD",
                                 use_speaker = FALSE) {
  dat <- prep_aoi_data(
    df = df,
    response = response,
    use_speaker = use_speaker
  ) %>%
    filter(as.character(AOI) == as.character(aoi_value)) %>%
    droplevels() %>%
    safe_plain_df()

  if (nrow(dat) == 0) {
    stop("Keine Daten nach Filterung für experiment = ", experiment_name, ", AOI = ", aoi_value)
  }

  f_gam_normal <- make_gam_normal_formula(
    response = response,
    use_speaker = use_speaker
  )

  f_gamma_glmm <- make_gamma_glmmtmb_formula(
    response = response,
    use_speaker = use_speaker
  )

  fit_normal <- fit_gam_normal(dat, f_gam_normal)
  fit_gamma  <- fit_gamma_glmmtmb(dat, f_gamma_glmm)

  plot_df_normal <- extract_gam_normal_resid_fitted(
    fit = fit_normal,
    data = dat,
    response = response
  )

  plot_df_gamma <- extract_gamma_glmmtmb_resid_fitted(
    fit = fit_gamma,
    data = dat,
    response = response
  )

  p_normal <- plot_resid_vs_fitted_single(
    plot_df = plot_df_normal,
    experiment = experiment_name,
    aoi = aoi_value,
    model_label = "Normal GAM"
  )

  p_gamma <- plot_resid_vs_fitted_single(
    plot_df = plot_df_gamma,
    experiment = experiment_name,
    aoi = aoi_value,
    model_label = "Gamma glmmTMB"
  )

  combined_plot <- p_normal + p_gamma + plot_layout(ncol = 2)

  list(
    experiment = experiment_name,
    AOI = as.character(aoi_value),
    n_obs = nrow(dat),
    fit_normal = fit_normal,
    fit_gamma = fit_gamma,
    plot_data_normal = plot_df_normal,
    plot_data_gamma = plot_df_gamma,
    plot = combined_plot
  )
}

# =========================================================
# ALLE EXPERIMENTE x AOI
# =========================================================

fit_and_plot_all_aois <- function(dfs,
                                  response = "FRT.WD",
                                  experiments_with_speaker = c("n_bed", "n_ein", "CS")) {
  out <- list()

  for (exp_name in names(dfs)) {
    df_exp <- dfs[[exp_name]]
    use_speaker <- exp_name %in% experiments_with_speaker

    dat_exp <- prep_aoi_data(
      df = df_exp,
      response = response,
      use_speaker = use_speaker
    )

    aois <- sort(unique(as.character(dat_exp$AOI)))

    for (aoi_i in aois) {
      key <- paste(exp_name, aoi_i, sep = "__")

      out[[key]] <- fit_and_plot_one_aoi(
        df = df_exp,
        experiment_name = exp_name,
        aoi_value = aoi_i,
        response = response,
        use_speaker = use_speaker
      )
    }
  }

  out
}

# =========================================================
# ALLE PLOTS DIREKT ALS OUTPUT-LISTE
# =========================================================

extract_all_plots <- function(res_obj) {
  purrr::map(res_obj, "plot")
}

# =========================================================
# EINEN PLOT EXTRAHIEREN
# =========================================================

get_aoi_plot <- function(res_obj, experiment, aoi) {
  key <- paste(experiment, aoi, sep = "__")

  if (!(key %in% names(res_obj))) {
    stop("Kein Eintrag gefunden für experiment = ", experiment, ", AOI = ", aoi)
  }

  res_obj[[key]]$plot
}

# =========================================================
# EIN GANZES RESULTAT EXTRAHIEREN
# =========================================================

get_aoi_result <- function(res_obj, experiment, aoi) {
  key <- paste(experiment, aoi, sep = "__")

  if (!(key %in% names(res_obj))) {
    stop("Kein Eintrag gefunden für experiment = ", experiment, ", AOI = ", aoi)
  }

  res_obj[[key]]
}

# =========================================================
# RECHNEN
# =========================================================

res_frtwd_residplots <- fit_and_plot_all_aois(
  dfs = dfs,
  response = "FRT.WD",
  experiments_with_speaker = experiments_with_speaker
)

# Alle Plots direkt als Output-Liste
all_frtwd_plots <- extract_all_plots(res_frtwd_residplots)

# =========================================================
# OUTPUTS
# =========================================================

# 1) Alle Plots liegen hier drin:
all_frtwd_plots

# 2) Einen konkreten Plot extrahieren:
# get_aoi_plot(res_frtwd_residplots, experiment = "c_bed", aoi = "1")

# 3) Ganzes Ergebnis für einen Fall:
# tmp <- get_aoi_result(res_frtwd_residplots, experiment = "c_bed", aoi = "1")
# tmp$n_obs
# tmp$fit_normal
# tmp$fit_gamma
# tmp$plot_data_normal
# tmp$plot_data_gamma
# tmp$plot
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(mgcv)
library(glmmTMB)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

# =========================================================
# INPUT
# Erwartet vorhandene Datensätze:
# c_bed, c_ein, n_bed, n_ein, CS
# =========================================================

dfs <- list(
  c_bed = c_bed,
  c_ein = c_ein,
  n_bed = n_bed,
  n_ein = n_ein,
  CS    = CS
)

experiments_with_speaker <- c("n_bed", "n_ein", "CS")

# =========================================================
# HELFER
# =========================================================

safe_plain_df <- function(df) {
  out <- as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN AOI-WEISE VORBEREITEN
# =========================================================

prep_aoi_data <- function(df,
                          response = "TRT.WD",
                          use_speaker = FALSE) {
  needed <- c(response, "condition", "AOI", "Participant", "Topic")
  if (use_speaker) needed <- c(needed, "speaker")

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[response]])) %>%
    filter(.data[[response]] > 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(condition), !is.na(AOI), !is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic)) %>%
    mutate(
      condition = factor(condition),
      AOI = factor(AOI),
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic)
    )

  if (use_speaker) {
    out <- out %>%
      filter(!is.na(speaker)) %>%
      mutate(speaker = factor(speaker))
  }

  safe_plain_df(out)
}

# =========================================================
# FORMELN
# =========================================================

make_gam_normal_formula <- function(response = "TRT.WD",
                                    use_speaker = FALSE) {
  rhs <- if (use_speaker) {
    "condition * speaker + s(Topic, bs = 're') + s(Participant, bs = 're')"
  } else {
    "condition + s(Topic, bs = 're') + s(Participant, bs = 're')"
  }

  as.formula(paste(response, "~", rhs))
}

make_gamma_glmmtmb_formula <- function(response = "TRT.WD",
                                       use_speaker = FALSE) {
  rhs <- if (use_speaker) {
    "condition * speaker + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
  } else {
    "condition + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
  }

  as.formula(paste(response, "~", rhs))
}

# =========================================================
# FITS
# =========================================================

fit_gam_normal <- function(data, formula) {
  tryCatch(
    mgcv::gam(
      formula = formula,
      data = data,
      family = gaussian(),
      method = "REML",
      select = TRUE
    ),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
}

fit_gamma_glmmtmb <- function(data, formula) {
  tryCatch(
    glmmTMB::glmmTMB(
      formula = formula,
      data = data,
      family = Gamma(link = "log")
    ),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
}

# =========================================================
# RESPONSE-RESIDUEN SELBST BERECHNEN
# residual = observed - fitted
# =========================================================

extract_gam_normal_resid_fitted <- function(fit, data, response = "TRT.WD") {
  observed <- data[[response]]

  if (is.null(fit)) {
    return(tibble(
      fitted = NA_real_,
      residual = NA_real_,
      observed = observed
    ))
  }

  fitted_vals <- tryCatch(
    as.numeric(predict(fit, type = "response")),
    error = function(e) rep(NA_real_, nrow(data))
  )

  tibble(
    fitted = fitted_vals,
    residual = observed - fitted_vals,
    observed = observed
  )
}

extract_gamma_glmmtmb_resid_fitted <- function(fit, data, response = "TRT.WD") {
  observed <- data[[response]]

  if (is.null(fit)) {
    return(tibble(
      fitted = NA_real_,
      residual = NA_real_,
      observed = observed
    ))
  }

  fitted_vals <- tryCatch(
    as.numeric(predict(fit, type = "response")),
    error = function(e) rep(NA_real_, nrow(data))
  )

  tibble(
    fitted = fitted_vals,
    residual = observed - fitted_vals,
    observed = observed
  )
}

# =========================================================
# EINZELPLOTS
# =========================================================

plot_resid_vs_fitted_single <- function(plot_df,
                                        experiment,
                                        aoi,
                                        model_label) {
  ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = fitted, y = residual)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.55) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = 2) +
    labs(
      title = model_label,
      subtitle = paste0("Experiment: ", experiment, " | AOI: ", aoi),
      x = "Fitted values",
      y = "Response residuals"
    ) +
    theme_bw()
}

# =========================================================
# EIN FALL: EXPERIMENT x AOI
# =========================================================

fit_and_plot_one_aoi <- function(df,
                                 experiment_name,
                                 aoi_value,
                                 response = "TRT.WD",
                                 use_speaker = FALSE) {
  dat <- prep_aoi_data(
    df = df,
    response = response,
    use_speaker = use_speaker
  ) %>%
    filter(as.character(AOI) == as.character(aoi_value)) %>%
    droplevels() %>%
    safe_plain_df()

  if (nrow(dat) == 0) {
    stop("Keine Daten nach Filterung für experiment = ", experiment_name, ", AOI = ", aoi_value)
  }

  f_gam_normal <- make_gam_normal_formula(
    response = response,
    use_speaker = use_speaker
  )

  f_gamma_glmm <- make_gamma_glmmtmb_formula(
    response = response,
    use_speaker = use_speaker
  )

  fit_normal <- fit_gam_normal(dat, f_gam_normal)
  fit_gamma  <- fit_gamma_glmmtmb(dat, f_gamma_glmm)

  plot_df_normal <- extract_gam_normal_resid_fitted(
    fit = fit_normal,
    data = dat,
    response = response
  )

  plot_df_gamma <- extract_gamma_glmmtmb_resid_fitted(
    fit = fit_gamma,
    data = dat,
    response = response
  )

  p_normal <- plot_resid_vs_fitted_single(
    plot_df = plot_df_normal,
    experiment = experiment_name,
    aoi = aoi_value,
    model_label = "Normal GAM"
  )

  p_gamma <- plot_resid_vs_fitted_single(
    plot_df = plot_df_gamma,
    experiment = experiment_name,
    aoi = aoi_value,
    model_label = "Gamma glmmTMB"
  )

  combined_plot <- p_normal + p_gamma + plot_layout(ncol = 2)

  list(
    experiment = experiment_name,
    AOI = as.character(aoi_value),
    n_obs = nrow(dat),
    fit_normal = fit_normal,
    fit_gamma = fit_gamma,
    plot_data_normal = plot_df_normal,
    plot_data_gamma = plot_df_gamma,
    plot = combined_plot
  )
}

# =========================================================
# ALLE EXPERIMENTE x AOI
# =========================================================

fit_and_plot_all_aois <- function(dfs,
                                  response = "TRT.WD",
                                  experiments_with_speaker = c("n_bed", "n_ein", "CS")) {
  out <- list()

  for (exp_name in names(dfs)) {
    df_exp <- dfs[[exp_name]]
    use_speaker <- exp_name %in% experiments_with_speaker

    dat_exp <- prep_aoi_data(
      df = df_exp,
      response = response,
      use_speaker = use_speaker
    )

    aois <- sort(unique(as.character(dat_exp$AOI)))

    for (aoi_i in aois) {
      key <- paste(exp_name, aoi_i, sep = "__")

      out[[key]] <- fit_and_plot_one_aoi(
        df = df_exp,
        experiment_name = exp_name,
        aoi_value = aoi_i,
        response = response,
        use_speaker = use_speaker
      )
    }
  }

  out
}

# =========================================================
# ALLE PLOTS DIREKT ALS OUTPUT-LISTE
# =========================================================

extract_all_plots <- function(res_obj) {
  purrr::map(res_obj, "plot")
}

# =========================================================
# EINEN PLOT EXTRAHIEREN
# =========================================================

get_aoi_plot <- function(res_obj, experiment, aoi) {
  key <- paste(experiment, aoi, sep = "__")

  if (!(key %in% names(res_obj))) {
    stop("Kein Eintrag gefunden für experiment = ", experiment, ", AOI = ", aoi)
  }

  res_obj[[key]]$plot
}

# =========================================================
# EIN GANZES RESULTAT EXTRAHIEREN
# =========================================================

get_aoi_result <- function(res_obj, experiment, aoi) {
  key <- paste(experiment, aoi, sep = "__")

  if (!(key %in% names(res_obj))) {
    stop("Kein Eintrag gefunden für experiment = ", experiment, ", AOI = ", aoi)
  }

  res_obj[[key]]
}

# =========================================================
# RECHNEN
# =========================================================

res_trtwd_residplots <- fit_and_plot_all_aois(
  dfs = dfs,
  response = "TRT.WD",
  experiments_with_speaker = experiments_with_speaker
)

# Alle Plots direkt als Output-Liste
all_trtwd_plots <- extract_all_plots(res_trtwd_residplots)

# =========================================================
# OUTPUTS
# =========================================================

# 1) Alle Plots liegen hier drin:
all_trtwd_plots

# 2) Einen konkreten Plot extrahieren:
# get_aoi_plot(res_trtwd_residplots, experiment = "c_bed", aoi = "1")

# 3) Ganzes Ergebnis für einen Fall:
# tmp <- get_aoi_result(res_trtwd_residplots, experiment = "c_bed", aoi = "1")
# tmp$n_obs
# tmp$fit_normal
# tmp$fit_gamma
# tmp$plot_data_normal
# tmp$plot_data_gamma
# tmp$plot
```



```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(mgcv)
library(glmmTMB)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

set.seed(123)

# =========================================================
# INPUT
# Nur die gewünschten Experimente
# =========================================================

dfs_sub <- list(
  c_bed = c_bed,
  c_ein = c_ein,
  CS    = CS
)

experiments_with_speaker <- c("CS")

# =========================================================
# HELFER
# =========================================================

safe_plain_df <- function(df) {
  out <- as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

collapse_unique <- function(x) {
  x <- unique(stats::na.omit(x))
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste(x, collapse = " | ")
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN AOI-WEISE
# =========================================================

prep_aoi_data <- function(df,
                          response,
                          use_speaker = FALSE) {
  needed <- c(response, "condition", "AOI", "Participant", "Topic")
  if (use_speaker) needed <- c(needed, "speaker")

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[response]])) %>%
    filter(.data[[response]] > 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(condition), !is.na(AOI), !is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic)) %>%
    mutate(
      condition = factor(condition),
      AOI = factor(AOI),
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic)
    )

  if (use_speaker) {
    out <- out %>%
      filter(!is.na(speaker)) %>%
      mutate(speaker = factor(speaker))
  }

  safe_plain_df(out)
}

# =========================================================
# FORMELN
# =========================================================

make_gam_normal_formula <- function(response,
                                    use_speaker = FALSE) {
  rhs <- if (use_speaker) {
    "condition * speaker + s(Topic, bs = 're') + s(Participant, bs = 're')"
  } else {
    "condition + s(Topic, bs = 're') + s(Participant, bs = 're')"
  }

  as.formula(paste(response, "~", rhs))
}

make_negbin2_formula <- function(response,
                                 use_speaker = FALSE) {
  rhs <- if (use_speaker) {
    "condition * speaker + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
  } else {
    "condition + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
  }

  as.formula(paste(response, "~", rhs))
}

# =========================================================
# FITS
# =========================================================

fit_gam_normal <- function(data, formula) {
  tryCatch(
    mgcv::gam(
      formula = formula,
      data = data,
      family = gaussian(),
      method = "REML",
      select = TRUE
    ),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
}

fit_negbin2 <- function(data, formula) {
  tryCatch(
    glmmTMB::glmmTMB(
      formula = formula,
      data = data,
      family = glmmTMB::nbinom2(link = "log")
    ),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
}

# =========================================================
# SIMULATION
# =========================================================

simulate_gam_normal <- function(fit, n_obs, nsim = 200) {
  if (is.null(fit)) return(NULL)

  mu <- tryCatch(
    as.numeric(predict(fit, type = "response")),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  sigma <- tryCatch(
    sqrt(summary(fit)$scale),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  if (is.null(mu) || is.null(sigma) || !is.finite(sigma)) return(NULL)

  sims <- replicate(
    nsim,
    stats::rnorm(n = n_obs, mean = mu, sd = sigma)
  )

  sims[sims <= 0] <- NA_real_
  sims
}

simulate_negbin2 <- function(fit, nsim = 200) {
  if (is.null(fit)) return(NULL)

  sim_list <- tryCatch(
    simulate(fit, nsim = nsim),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  if (is.null(sim_list)) return(NULL)

  sim_mat <- as.matrix(sim_list)
  storage.mode(sim_mat) <- "numeric"
  sim_mat
}

# =========================================================
# DICHTEDATEN
# =========================================================

make_density_df <- function(x, label, n = 512, from = NULL, to = NULL) {
  x <- x[is.finite(x)]
  if (length(x) < 2) {
    return(tibble(x = NA_real_, y = NA_real_, source = label))
  }

  dd <- density(x, n = n, from = from, to = to, na.rm = TRUE)

  tibble(
    x = dd$x,
    y = dd$y,
    source = label
  )
}

make_mean_sim_density_df <- function(sim_mat, label, from = NULL, to = NULL, n = 512) {
  if (is.null(sim_mat)) {
    return(tibble(x = NA_real_, y = NA_real_, source = label))
  }

  dens_list <- vector("list", ncol(sim_mat))

  for (j in seq_len(ncol(sim_mat))) {
    xj <- sim_mat[, j]
    xj <- xj[is.finite(xj)]
    if (length(xj) < 2) next

    dd <- density(xj, n = n, from = from, to = to, na.rm = TRUE)
    dens_list[[j]] <- tibble(
      x = dd$x,
      y = dd$y
    )
  }

  dens_list <- dens_list[!vapply(dens_list, is.null, logical(1))]

  if (length(dens_list) == 0) {
    return(tibble(x = NA_real_, y = NA_real_, source = label))
  }

  bind_rows(dens_list, .id = "sim_id") %>%
    group_by(x) %>%
    summarise(y = mean(y, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(source = label)
}

# =========================================================
# EIN PLOT
# =========================================================

plot_density_compare <- function(density_df,
                                 experiment,
                                 aoi,
                                 response) {
  ggplot(density_df, aes(x = x, y = y, color = source, linetype = source)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 0.9) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
        "Observed" = "black",
        "Normal GAM simulated" = "steelblue",
        "NegBin2 glmmTMB simulated" = "firebrick"
      )
    ) +
    labs(
      title = "Dichtevergleich",
      subtitle = paste0("Experiment: ", experiment, " | AOI: ", aoi, " | Response: ", response),
      x = response,
      y = "Density",
      color = NULL,
      linetype = NULL
    ) +
    theme_bw()
}

# =========================================================
# EIN FALL: experiment x AOI x response
# =========================================================

fit_and_plot_one_case <- function(df,
                                  experiment_name,
                                  aoi_value,
                                  response,
                                  use_speaker = FALSE,
                                  nsim = 200) {
  dat <- prep_aoi_data(
    df = df,
    response = response,
    use_speaker = use_speaker
  ) %>%
    filter(as.character(AOI) == as.character(aoi_value)) %>%
    droplevels() %>%
    safe_plain_df()

  if (nrow(dat) == 0) {
    stop("Keine Daten nach Filterung für experiment = ", experiment_name,
         ", AOI = ", aoi_value,
         ", response = ", response)
  }

  f_normal <- make_gam_normal_formula(
    response = response,
    use_speaker = use_speaker
  )

  f_negbin2 <- make_negbin2_formula(
    response = response,
    use_speaker = use_speaker
  )

  fit_normal <- fit_gam_normal(dat, f_normal)
  fit_negbin2 <- fit_negbin2(dat, f_negbin2)

  obs <- dat[[response]]
  x_min <- min(obs, na.rm = TRUE)
  x_max <- max(obs, na.rm = TRUE)

  sim_normal <- simulate_gam_normal(
    fit = fit_normal,
    n_obs = nrow(dat),
    nsim = nsim
  )

  sim_negbin2 <- simulate_negbin2(
    fit = fit_negbin2,
    nsim = nsim
  )

  density_obs <- make_density_df(
    x = obs,
    label = "Observed",
    from = x_min,
    to = x_max
  )

  density_normal <- make_mean_sim_density_df(
    sim_mat = sim_normal,
    label = "Normal GAM simulated",
    from = x_min,
    to = x_max
  )

  density_negbin2 <- make_mean_sim_density_df(
    sim_mat = sim_negbin2,
    label = "NegBin2 glmmTMB simulated",
    from = x_min,
    to = x_max
  )

  density_df <- bind_rows(
    density_obs,
    density_normal,
    density_negbin2
  )

  p <- plot_density_compare(
    density_df = density_df,
    experiment = experiment_name,
    aoi = aoi_value,
    response = response
  )

  list(
    experiment = experiment_name,
    AOI = as.character(aoi_value),
    response = response,
    n_obs = nrow(dat),
    fit_normal = fit_normal,
    fit_negbin2 = fit_negbin2,
    density_data = density_df,
    plot = p
  )
}

# =========================================================
# ALLE FÄLLE
# =========================================================

fit_and_plot_all_cases <- function(dfs,
                                   responses = c("FRT.WD", "TRT.WD"),
                                   experiments_with_speaker = c("CS"),
                                   nsim = 200) {
  out <- list()

  for (resp in responses) {
    for (exp_name in names(dfs)) {
      df_exp <- dfs[[exp_name]]
      use_speaker <- exp_name %in% experiments_with_speaker

      dat_exp <- prep_aoi_data(
        df = df_exp,
        response = resp,
        use_speaker = use_speaker
      )

      aois <- sort(unique(as.character(dat_exp$AOI)))

      for (aoi_i in aois) {
        key <- paste(resp, exp_name, aoi_i, sep = "__")

        out[[key]] <- fit_and_plot_one_case(
          df = df_exp,
          experiment_name = exp_name,
          aoi_value = aoi_i,
          response = resp,
          use_speaker = use_speaker,
          nsim = nsim
        )
      }
    }
  }

  out
}

# =========================================================
# EXTRAKTION
# =========================================================

extract_all_plots <- function(res_obj) {
  purrr::map(res_obj, "plot")
}

get_plot <- function(res_obj, response, experiment, aoi) {
  key <- paste(response, experiment, aoi, sep = "__")

  if (!(key %in% names(res_obj))) {
    stop("Kein Eintrag gefunden für response = ", response,
         ", experiment = ", experiment,
         ", AOI = ", aoi)
  }

  res_obj[[key]]$plot
}

get_result <- function(res_obj, response, experiment, aoi) {
  key <- paste(response, experiment, aoi, sep = "__")

  if (!(key %in% names(res_obj))) {
    stop("Kein Eintrag gefunden für response = ", response,
         ", experiment = ", experiment,
         ", AOI = ", aoi)
  }

  res_obj[[key]]
}

# =========================================================
# RECHNEN
# =========================================================

res_density_normal_vs_negbin2 <- fit_and_plot_all_cases(
  dfs = dfs_sub,
  responses = c("FRT.WD", "TRT.WD"),
  experiments_with_speaker = experiments_with_speaker,
  nsim = 200
)

all_density_plots <- extract_all_plots(res_density_normal_vs_negbin2)

# =========================================================
# OUTPUTS
# =========================================================

all_density_plots

# Beispiele:
# get_plot(res_density_normal_vs_negbin2, response = "FRT.WD", experiment = "c_bed", aoi = "1")
# get_plot(res_density_normal_vs_negbin2, response = "TRT.WD", experiment = "CS", aoi = "2")

# tmp <- get_result(res_density_normal_vs_negbin2, response = "FRT.WD", experiment = "c_ein", aoi = "1")
# tmp$density_data
# tmp$plot
```
